name: Equipment Loan Agreement (Gratuitous)
description: A contract outlining the terms for lending equipment or personal property to someone temporarily and free of charge.
content:
EQUIPMENT LOAN AGREEMENT

This Equipment Loan Agreement (the "Agreement") is made and entered into on {{formatDate agreement_date}} by and between the Lender and the Borrower named below, regarding the temporary and gratuitous loan of the specified equipment.

1. THE PARTIES

Lender: {{lender_name}}, Address: {{lender_address}}, Phone: {{lender_phone}}

Borrower: {{borrower_name}}, Address: {{borrower_address}}, Phone: {{borrower_phone}}

2. DESCRIPTION OF LOANED EQUIPMENT

The Lender agrees to loan to the Borrower, and the Borrower accepts, the following equipment (the "Equipment"):

{{equipment_description}}

Condition at time of handover: {{equipment_condition}}

3. LOAN PERIOD AND RETURN

The Equipment is loaned to the Borrower for a period of {{loan_duration}}.

The Borrower agrees to return the Equipment to the Lender no later than {{formatDate return_date}}. The Equipment must be returned in the exact same condition it was received, ordinary wear and tear excepted.

Return Location: {{return_location}}

4. USE AND LIABILITY

  • The Borrower agrees to use the Equipment exclusively for: {{intended_use}}.
  • The Borrower shall exercise due care and maintain the Equipment properly while in their possession.
  • If the Equipment is lost, stolen, or damaged beyond ordinary wear and tear while in the Borrower's custody, the Borrower agrees to: {{liability_for_loss}}.
  • The Borrower may not sublease, lend, or transfer the Equipment to any third party without the express written consent of the Lender.
{{#if (eq deposit_collected 'Yes')}}

5. SECURITY DEPOSIT

The Borrower has provided the Lender with a Security Deposit in the amount of {{deposit_amount}}. This deposit will be held by the Lender and returned in full to the Borrower upon the safe and timely return of the Equipment in satisfactory condition.

{{/if}}

By signing below, both parties acknowledge that they have read, understood, and agreed to the terms of this Agreement.

LENDER
{{lender_name}}

Signature: _________________________

BORROWER
{{borrower_name}}

Signature: _________________________

fields.name: equipment_description
fields.label: Description of Equipment
fields.placeholder: Include Make, Model, Serial Number, and accessories.

fields.name: equipment_condition
fields.label: Condition at Handover
fields.placeholder: e.g., Like new, Good working condition

fields.name: loan_duration
fields.label: Duration of Loan
fields.placeholder: e.g., 2 Weeks, For the duration of the project

fields.name: intended_use
fields.label: Intended Use of Equipment
fields.placeholder: e.g., Personal photography project, Event presentation

fields.name: liability_for_loss
fields.label: Liability for Loss/Damage
fields.placeholder: e.g., Pay full replacement cost of $500, cover all repair fees.

fields.name: deposit_collected
fields.label: Has a Security Deposit been collected?
